results.title: EPF scheme 2026: Should you reduce your PF contribution if your employer gives you the choice?
results.description: Under the new labour code framework, the mandatory 12 percent contribution continues only up to the statutory wage ceiling

results.title: Heavy rainfall caused waterlogging, leading to rainwater entering homes in bhubaneswar
results.description: #ଭ ୁବନେଶ୍ବରରେ_ଘରେ_ପଶିଲା_ପାଣି ସାରା ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ବର୍ଷା ବିତ୍ପାତ୍ତ। ୨ ଦିନ ହେଲା ଲାଗି ରହିଛି ବର୍ଷା। ଚାରିଆଡେ ପାଣି। ରାଜଧାନୀ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ବରରେ ୧୦୦ ମିମି ଅତିକ୍ରମ କଲା ବର୍ଷା। ୨୪ ଘଣ୍ଟାରେ ୧୧୨.୩ ମିମି ବର୍ଷା ହୋଇଥିବା ସୂଚନା। ସେପଟେ ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା କାରଣରୁ ଘରେ ପାଣି ପଶିଛି। ରାଜଧାନୀର ହଂସପାଳ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଘରେ ବର୍ଷା ପାଣି ପସିଯାଇଛି। Continuous rainfall over the past two days has caused widespread waterlogging in Bhubaneswar, with the city recording 112.3 mm of rainfall in the last 24 hours. The heavy downpour has led to rainwater entering several houses in the Hanspal area, affecting residents and disrupting normal life. As rain continues across Odisha, the situation in the state capital highlights the growing impact of persistent monsoon showers and urban flooding. #BhubaneswarNews #Hanspal #HeavyRain #OdishaRain #Waterlogging #UrbanFlooding #Monsoon #RainAlert #HanspalFlooding_Bhubaneswar #BhubaneswarHeavyRain #OdishaMonsoonUpdate #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: Tesla, BYD to Tata Motors: How should Indian investors play the EV theme? Experts explain the right strategy
results.description: Gas prices surged, prompting questions about investing in EV stocks like Tesla. However, valuations may not align with sales. Experts advise focusing on long-term EV adoption trends and diversifying investments rather than reacting to short-term fuel price spikes.
